message: Node started: Determine the relationship between the isothermal force F_iso(x) and the adiabatic force F_adi(x) for a system of n particles. Specifically, derive how the internal energy constraint in a thermally isolated (microcanonical) system modifies the partition function or the entropy-based force derivation compared to the standard isothermal case, accounting for the change in the effective number of degrees of freedom available to the chain.
